return(function(t,I,Z,F,L,V,Q,v,u,z,O,P,s,m,b,p,X,a,e,D,r,w,R,c)P,a,O,z,X,p,b,r,m,s,c,D,v,R,e,u,w=function(t,k)local I=z(k)local Z=function(Z,F,L,V,Q,v,X)return O(t,{Z,F,L;V;Q;v;X},k,I)end return Z
